raw:
{
  "task_plan": [
    {
      "task_id": "task_08_net_subsystem_existence",
      "question_ids": ["Q08_001", "Q08_002"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "确认是否存在网络子系统（协议栈或socket层），并判断协议栈来源（第三方库如lwip/smoltcp或自研）",
      "group_reason": "两题均需先定位网络子系统整体存在性及来源，共享同一发现路径",
      "query": "查找网络协议栈实现，搜索lwip、smoltcp、tcp、udp、socket等关键词，确认是否存在及来源",
      "seed_paths": ["net", "tcp", "udp", "socket", "lwip", "smoltcp", "src"],
      "entry_symbols": ["main"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "build_config"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_08_socket_syscall_interface",
      "question_ids": ["Q08_003"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证是否实现socket系统调用接口（socket/bind/connect/sendto/recvfrom等），找到定义与实现体",
      "group_reason": "独立题，需专门追踪socket相关系统调用入口",
      "query": "搜索socket、bind、connect、sendto、recvfrom系统调用实现，确认是否存在",
      "seed_paths": ["syscall", "src", "socket"],
      "entry_symbols": ["sys_socket", "sys_bind", "sys_connect", "sys_sendto", "sys_recvfrom"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_08_send_path_trace",
      "question_ids": ["Q08_004"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "追踪sys_sendto发送路径：syscall层→协议栈→网卡驱动，列出3-6个关键节点并给出证据",
      "group_reason": "独立题，需完整追踪发送链路，涉及多个层次",
      "query": "从sys_sendto开始追踪发送路径，经过协议栈到网卡驱动，找出关键函数调用链",
      "seed_paths": ["syscall", "net", "tcp", "udp", "src"],
      "entry_symbols": ["sys_sendto", "sys_write", "tcp_output", "udp_send", "netif"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site", "usage_flow"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_08_nic_driver_interrupt",
      "question_ids": ["Q08_005"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证是否实现网卡驱动（virtio-net/e1000等）与收包中断路径，找到驱动代码和中断处理",
      "group_reason": "独立题，需定位网卡驱动实现及中断处理逻辑",
      "query": "搜索virtio-net、e1000、网卡驱动、中断处理、接收路径相关代码",
      "seed_paths": ["src", "net", "driver"],
      "entry_symbols": ["virtio_net", "e1000", "interrupt_handler", "recv", "netif_rx"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "call_site"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_08_protocol_support",
      "question_ids": ["Q08_006"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "确认协议支持情况：Ethernet/ARP/IPv4/IPv6/ICMP/UDP/TCP/DHCP/DNS，找到各协议实现证据",
      "group_reason": "独立题，需逐一检查各协议实现，共享协议栈代码区域",
      "query": "搜索Ethernet、ARP、IPv4、IPv6、ICMP、UDP、TCP、DHCP、DNS协议实现代码",
      "seed_paths": ["net", "tcp", "udp", "lwip", "smoltcp", "src"],
      "entry_symbols": ["eth", "arp", "ip", "icmp", "udp", "tcp", "dhcp", "dns"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body"]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "task_08_zero_copy_dma",
      "question_ids": ["Q08_007"],
      "task_type": "react_code",
      "agent_type": "react_code",
      "task_goal": "查证是否存在零拷贝/共享缓冲/DMA描述符路径，找到相关实现代码（非仅名词引用）",
      "group_reason": "独立题，需专门搜索零拷贝、DMA、共享缓冲相关实现",
      "query": "搜索zero-copy、DMA descriptor、shared buffer、零拷贝、描述符环等实现代码",
      "seed_paths": ["net", "src", "driver"],
      "entry_symbols": ["dma", "zero_copy", "descriptor", "buffer_pool", "mbuf"],
      "expected_evidence_types": ["definition", "implementation_body", "usage_flow"]
    }
  ]
}
